ab: Sai, ukain na lumaq davuc , inain casu mabaliv vi davuc.
ch: W:Sai，家裡沒有米酒了，你去買米酒。
en: Sai, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: Hezang tac’a pan ha’an pit’ai’an ta, maqatu nitu mabaliv o!
ch: M:廚房裡還有一瓶，可以不用買吧!
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: Mavia i muaz tac’a pan, muqnag baliv tusa pan.
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: Mabaliv cak davuc, heza amu babaliv?
ch: M:我要買米酒，你們有賣嗎?
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: Heza i, piaq su a balivun?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: Mabaliv cak tusa pan, hezang tac’a kapa tu tilac.
ch: M:我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: Idi a tilac ci, hezang su maqa’ qa na balivun?
ch: W:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: Na balivan cak ki qepuan, heza mu balivun?
en: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

ab: Ukain! Aminunin isbaliv va qepuan.
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: Asa cak baliv vi huluc.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: Makuq’ su asa’un tu huluc?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: Mabaliv cak maputul pakima’un tu huluc.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: Maqkuqa qa madangqac di saduan su?
en: How about this red one?

ab: Heza duma patacsang tu qaihav?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: Hezang nam madoqlac cin masanglav.
en: We have white and blue ones too.

ab: Avin cak tac’a masanglav tu huluc.
ch: M:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: Laung in’iack casu sangan cunah? Pintatamasaz casu hubung?
ch: W:Laung你剛剛去哪裡了?你去運動嗎?
en: Laung, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: Ni, qatangaz cak qodacnoaz babalivi sanglav.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: O~ mopataqana, heza nopa su sanavan ziqan? Maqatu cata muckun ma’un sanavan.
ch: W:喔~這樣啊，你晚上有沒有空?和我一起吃飯吧。
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: Nitumqtu, na tan cak mabaliv vi huluc.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: Na malavi cak su.
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: Uninag, piaq qa sanglav vi cui?
ch: M:你好，請問這把菜多少錢?
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: Mapusan cui qa sanglav maca tac’a linoqouc.
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: Piaq hutan ngi cui?
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: Mati’un cui maca tac’a tingting.
en: Sweet potatoes are thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: Mabaliv cak tusa sanglav cin tac’a tingting tu hutan.
ch: M:我買兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
